{{Infobox artifact
| name = Celestial lenses
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Celestial lenses]] are used by [[Judges]] and high-ranking [[Abidan]] to monitor [[Iterations]] from the [[Way]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2">''Skysworn'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Celestial lenses]] display images of the future that look like dreams.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2" />}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|A celestial lens can form a rectangular screen of purple-tinted light.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2">''Uncrowned'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
